_comment: PsyClaw 方法学背书库。每个设计/分析决策的经典文献支撑。psyclaw cite <topic> 查询;DESIGN.evidence 质量检查要求决策台账每条决策引用本库或自补文献。

topics.decision: 两组比较默认用 Welch 而非 Student t
topics.citation: Delacre, M., Lakens, D., & Leys, C. (2017). Why psychologists should by default use Welch's t-test instead of Student's t-test. International Review of Social Psychology, 30(1), 92-101.
topics.gist: 方差齐性检验前置的两步法损害 I 类错误控制;Welch 在方差齐时几乎无损,不齐时显著更稳

topics.decision: 中介间接效应用 bootstrap CI,不用 Sobel
topics.citation: Preacher, K. J., & Hayes, A. F. (2008). Asymptotic and resampling strategies for assessing and comparing indirect effects in multiple mediator models. Behavior Research Methods, 40(3), 879-891.
topics.gist: 间接效应抽样分布非正态,Sobel 正态假设导致功效损失;bootstrap 不依赖该假设

topics.decision: 横断数据的中介必须声明因果局限
topics.citation: Maxwell, S. E., & Cole, D. A. (2007). Bias in cross-sectional analyses of longitudinal mediation. Psychological Methods, 12(1), 23-44.
topics.gist: 横断中介估计可严重偏离真实纵向中介过程,甚至方向都错

topics.decision: 纵向交叉滞后优先 RI-CLPM 而非传统 CLPM
topics.citation: Hamaker, E. L., Kuiper, R. M., & Grasman, R. P. (2015). A critique of the cross-lagged panel model. Psychological Methods, 20(1), 102-116.
topics.gist: 传统 CLPM 混淆个体间稳定差异与个体内过程,交叉滞后系数可能完全是假象

topics.decision: 在线问卷必做草率作答筛查
topics.citation: Meade, A. W., & Craig, S. B. (2012). Identifying careless responses in survey data. Psychological Methods, 17(3), 437-455. 另见 Curran, P. G. (2016). Methods for the detection of carelessly invalid responses in survey data. Journal of Experimental Social Psychology, 66, 4-19.
topics.gist: 在线样本 3-10% 草率作答会衰减效应并扭曲因子结构;longstring/IRV/一致性指标组合使用

topics.decision: longstring 指标的依据
topics.citation: Johnson, J. A. (2005). Ascertaining the validity of individual protocols from web-based personality inventories. Journal of Research in Personality, 39(1), 103-129.
topics.gist: 连续相同作答长度是无效协议的有效指标

topics.decision: 功效分析的效应量先验取心理学现实值(r≈.20)而非教科书'中等'
topics.citation: Richard, F. D., Bond, C. F., & Stokes-Zoota, J. J. (2003). One hundred years of social psychology quantitatively described. Review of General Psychology, 7(4), 331-363. 另见 Brysbaert, M. (2019). How many participants do we have to include in properly powered experiments? Journal of Cognition, 2(1), 16.
topics.gist: 百年社心元-元分析均值 r≈.21;按 d=.5 算功效普遍样本不足

topics.decision: 交互效应按交互项做功效分析(常需主效应 4 倍 N)
topics.citation: McClelland, G. H., & Judd, C. M. (1993). Statistical difficulties of detecting interactions and moderator effects. Psychological Bulletin, 114(2), 376-390.
topics.gist: 场地研究中交互项残差方差远小于实验,可检测性急剧下降

topics.decision: 测量不变性判定用 ΔCFI≤.010(配合 ΔRMSEA≤.015)
topics.citation: Cheung, G. W., & Rensvold, R. B. (2002). Evaluating goodness-of-fit indexes for testing measurement invariance. Structural Equation Modeling, 9(2), 233-255. 另见 Chen, F. F. (2007). Sensitivity of goodness of fit indexes to lack of measurement invariance. SEM, 14(3), 464-504.
topics.gist: Δχ² 对样本量过敏;ΔCFI 准则在模拟中表现稳定

topics.decision: SEM 拟合临界值 CFI≥.95/RMSEA≤.06/SRMR≤.08 的出处
topics.citation: Hu, L., & Bentler, P. M. (1999). Cutoff criteria for fit indexes in covariance structure analysis. Structural Equation Modeling, 6(1), 1-55.
topics.gist: 组合准则;注意它们是经验参考不是铁律,小样本/少指标时表现不同

topics.decision: 总分合理性用 ωH/ECV 判断而非只比双因子拟合
topics.citation: Rodriguez, A., Reise, S. P., & Haviland, M. G. (2016). Evaluating bifactor models: Calculating and interpreting statistical indices. Psychological Methods, 21(2), 137-150.
topics.gist: 双因子几乎总拟合更优;ωH>.80 且 ECV>.70 才支持把量表当单维总分用

topics.decision: 信度默认报 ω,α 仅作兼容
topics.citation: McNeish, D. (2018). Thanks coefficient alpha, we'll take it from here. Psychological Methods, 23(3), 412-433. 另见 Dunn, T. J., Baguley, T., & Brunsden, V. (2014). From alpha to omega. British Journal of Psychology, 105(3), 399-412.
topics.gist: α 的 tau 等价假设几乎总被违反;ω 基于因子模型更准确

topics.decision: Likert 单题按有序变量处理
topics.citation: Liddell, T. M., & Kruschke, J. K. (2018). Analyzing ordinal data with metric models: What could possibly go wrong? Journal of Experimental Social Psychology, 79, 328-348.
topics.gist: 把有序当连续可产生假效应、漏真效应甚至效应反向

topics.decision: 非随机分组不能靠 ANCOVA '控制'基线差异
topics.citation: Miller, G. A., & Chapman, J. P. (2001). Misunderstanding analysis of covariance. Journal of Abnormal Psychology, 110(1), 40-48. 经典:Lord, F. M. (1967). A paradox in the interpretation of group comparisons. Psychological Bulletin, 68(5), 304-305.
topics.gist: 组与协变量相关时,'统计控制'移除的恰是组效应本身的一部分(Lord 悖论)

topics.decision: 随机实验的前后测分析首选 ANCOVA(优于增益分数/组×时间 ANOVA)
topics.citation: Van Breukelen, G. J. (2006). ANCOVA versus change from baseline: More power in randomized studies, more bias in nonrandomized studies. Journal of Clinical Epidemiology, 59(9), 920-925.
topics.gist: 随机化下 ANCOVA 无偏且功效最高;非随机下反而更偏(与 ancova_lord 互补)

topics.decision: 刺激应作随机因素进交叉随机效应模型
topics.citation: Judd, C. M., Westfall, J., & Kenny, D. A. (2012). Treating stimuli as a random factor in social psychology. Journal of Personality and Social Psychology, 103(1), 54-69.
topics.gist: 刺激当固定因素的 I 类错误率可达 .40+;结论无法推广到刺激总体

topics.decision: 研究者自由度的先验约束(预注册分析计划)
topics.citation: Simmons, J. P., Nelson, L. D., & Simonsohn, U. (2011). False-positive psychology. Psychological Science, 22(11), 1359-1366.
topics.gist: 未声明的灵活性(可选停止/协变量挑选/条件合并)可把假阳性推到 60%+

topics.decision: 预注册作为确证性研究的资格证
topics.citation: Nosek, B. A., Ebersole, C. R., DeHaven, A. C., & Mellor, D. T. (2018). The preregistration revolution. PNAS, 115(11), 2600-2606.
topics.gist: 预测与事后解释的认知地位不同;预注册区分两者

topics.decision: '无差异'结论必须用等价检验而非 p>.05
topics.citation: Lakens, D. (2017). Equivalence tests: A practical primer for t tests, correlations, and meta-analyses. Social Psychological and Personality Science, 8(4), 355-362.
topics.gist: 不显著≠无效应;TOST 在设定的最小关注效应边界内检验等价性

topics.decision: EFA 因子数用平行分析定
topics.citation: Horn, J. L. (1965). A rationale and test for the number of factors in factor analysis. Psychometrika, 30(2), 179-185. 现代评估:Auerswald, M., & Moshagen, M. (2019). How to determine the number of factors to retain in exploratory factor analysis. Psychological Methods, 24(4), 468-491.
topics.gist: Kaiser 准则(特征值>1)系统性高估因子数;平行分析综合表现最佳

topics.decision: 离群值检测用 MAD 法而非均值±SD
topics.citation: Leys, C., Ley, C., Klein, O., Bernard, P., & Licata, L. (2013). Detecting outliers: Do not use standard deviation around the mean, use absolute deviation around the median. Journal of Experimental Social Psychology, 49(4), 764-766.
topics.gist: 均值与 SD 本身被离群值污染;MAD 稳健

topics.decision: 禁止'A组显著B组不显著→两组不同'的推断
topics.citation: Gelman, A., & Stern, H. (2006). The difference between "significant" and "not significant" is not itself statistically significant. The American Statistician, 60(4), 328-331.
topics.gist: 比较两个效应必须直接检验交互/差值,不能比较各自显著性

topics.decision: 球形性违反用 Greenhouse-Geisser/Huynh-Feldt 校正
topics.citation: Greenhouse, S. W., & Geisser, S. (1959). On methods in the analysis of profile data. Psychometrika, 24(2), 95-112.
topics.gist: ε 校正自由度控制 I 类错误;ε<.75 用 GG,否则 HF

topics.decision: 报告完整性对照 APA JARS
topics.citation: Appelbaum, M., Cooper, H., Kline, R. B., Mayo-Wilson, E., Nezu, A. M., & Rao, S. M. (2018). Journal article reporting standards for quantitative research in psychology: The APA Publications and Communications Board task force report. American Psychologist, 73(1), 3-25.
topics.gist: 量化研究报告标准官方出处(JARS-Quant)

topics.decision: 密集追踪/日记法设计与多层建模规范
topics.citation: Bolger, N., & Laurenceau, J.-P. (2013). Intensive longitudinal methods: An introduction to diary and experience sampling research. Guilford Press.
topics.gist: 信号方案、人内中心化、多层信度的标准参考

topics.decision: 网络分析必报边权与中心性稳定性
topics.citation: Epskamp, S., Borsboom, D., & Fried, E. I. (2018). Estimating psychological networks and their accuracy: A tutorial paper. Behavior Research Methods, 50(1), 195-212.
topics.gist: bootstrap 边权 CI 与 CS 系数;CS<.25 的中心性排序不可解释
